mapper.select:
SELECT m.promotion_id, b.title, b.benefits, b.image_url, m.fk_hotel_id, m.discount_rate, m.price, m.is_active, TO_CHAR(m.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(m.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_date FROM PROMOTION_MASTER m INNER JOIN PROMOTION_BANNER b ON m.promotion_id = b.fk_promotion_id WHERE m.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND b.active_yn = 'Y' AND b.banner_type = 'CARD'
AND m.is_active = 1 AND SYSDATE BETWEEN m.start_date AND m.end_date
ORDER BY m.is_active DESC, m.start_date DESC

SELECT m.promotion_id, m.fk_hotel_id, m.price, m.discount_rate, m.discount_amount, m.is_active, m.target_room_type, m.target_bed_type, m.target_view_type, TO_CHAR(m.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(m.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_date, b.banner_id, b.title, b.subtitle, b.benefits, b.image_url, b.sort_order FROM PROMOTION_MASTER m INNER JOIN PROMOTION_BANNER b ON m.promotion_id = b.fk_promotion_id WHERE m.promotion_id = #{promotionId} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PROMOTION_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PROMOTION_MASTER ( promotion_id, fk_hotel_id, title, price, discount_rate, discount_amount, start_date, end_date, is_active, target_room_type, target_bed_type, target_view_type ) VALUES ( #{promotion_id}, #{fk_hotel_id}, #{title}, #{price}, #{discount_rate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{discount_amount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{is_active}, #{target_room_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{target_bed_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{target_view_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO PROMOTION_BANNER ( banner_id, fk_promotion_id, fk_hotel_id, banner_type, title, subtitle, benefits, image_url, sort_order, active_yn ) VALUES ( SEQ_PROMO_BANNER_ID.NEXTVAL, #{promotion_id}, #{fk_hotel_id}, #{banner_type}, #{title}, #{subtitle}, #{benefits}, #{image_url, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort_order}, 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE PROMOTION_MASTER SET title = #{title}, start_date = TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), end_date = TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), discount_rate = #{discount_rate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, discount_amount = #{discount_amount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, is_active = #{is_active}, price = #{price, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, target_room_type = #{target_room_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_bed_type = #{target_bed_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_view_type = #{target_view_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE promotion_id = #{promotion_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RESERVATION_PROMOTION_MAPPING ( mapping_id, reservation_id, promotion_id, applied_price_at_time, applied_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_RESERVE_PROMO_MAP_ID.NEXTVAL, #{reservation_id}, #{promotion_id}, #{applied_price}, SYSDATE )
